title: seseli rigidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Seseli rigidum subsp. rigidum is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils, particularly seselin and carotol. Seseli rigidum subsp. rigidum is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. It is commonly prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal and culinary purposes.
